name: gsc-jollyroom-internal
description: Claude Desktop extension that connects to the internal Jollyroom Search Console MCP server.
long_description: Installs a local Claude Desktop MCP extension that forwards tool calls to the internal Search Console MCP backend running inside the Jollyroom network. Pairs with the GA4 MCP — GA4 says how a page performed for sessions, GSC says how it performed for queries and impressions.

internal_mcp_url.title: Internal MCP URL
internal_mcp_url.description: Internal base URL or direct /mcp URL for the GSC backend, for example http://gsc-mcp.jollyroom.local:3001 or http://10.201.15.60:3001/mcp.

internal_mcp_auth_token.title: Internal MCP bearer token
internal_mcp_auth_token.description: Shared bearer token for the internal GSC MCP backend. Leave empty only if the backend auth is disabled.
